headline: DS PR-1 (Hds-prefix retirement, step 1) COMPLETE on claude/deprefix-hds — dropped the Hds prefix from the 12 net-new leaf families (ToggleButton/AlertDialog/HoverCard/ContextMenu/AspectRatio/MultiSelector/Lightbox/Calendar/TimeInput/DateInput/DateRangeInput/DateTimeInput), renamed their hds-*.tsx source files, flipped scaffold-component.mjs + component-discovery.mjs so Hds is now the namespace violation going forward. All 5 mandated gates green (typecheck, check-manifest-drift, check-source-canon, validate-manifest, vite build); full vitest suite 1108 passing. Committed locally, not pushed — awaiting lead review.
next: Review + push claude/deprefix-hds, then land follow-on PRs retiring Hds from the remaining components (the 4 collision families Form/FormField/ThemeProvider/Tooltip need alias handling; the provider/theme surface and JSX-compiler DSL tags stay prefixed by design)

Optional follow-ups: add an Overlays doc page (unblocks @doc-exempt overlays incl. AlertDialog/HoverCard/ContextMenu/MultiSelector), wire Figma Code Connect stubs, add visual-regression coverage for the date family
Monitor the virtual-hds-manifest size budget (now 42.7/46 kB) as more components land
